oracleCard.name: Basilisk Collar
oracleCard.text:
Equipped creature has deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

oracleCard.name: Command Tower
oracleCard.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

oracleCard.name: The Key to the Vault
oracleCard.text:
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, look at that many cards from the top of your library. You may exile a nonland card from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. You may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost.
Equip {2}{U}
